name: Parsley Stuffing Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together, adding grated lemon rind, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste.
2. Roll the mixture into balls about the size of walnuts.
3. Place the balls a little apart in a greased baking tin.
4. Bake for about 25 minutes at 190°C/375°F/Gas Mark 5, turning them after about 15 minutes so they become crisp all over.
